calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #11, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Packard for (trustee) Barbara Hurley.

The Court stated that this is the 11th and final accounting of the trustee, that there are a couple of issues, that it is not sure the amended document was properly served and that the fees show up as different amounts in different documents. Mr. Packard responded that the petition was amended to report the redemption of shares, that they were disclosed in the F1 schedule, that it became part of the accounting and that notice was given in June. The Court confirmed that it should treat the later filing as a supplement and not an amendment. Mr. Packard stated that the $2880.00 is based on the statement. The Court stated that when adding up the invoices they come to $2667.50. Mr. Packard explained the calculation, stated that there is $4440.00 left in the account and that he is fine with whatever amount the Court puts in. The Court took the accounting petition under submission and Mr. Packard provided a proposed order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Continued To Apr-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear on April 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the 9th Account has not been filed and why they failed to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Packard for Barbara Hurley.

Mr. Packard filed the accounting this morning and provided an endorsed copy to the Court. The Court reminded Mr. Packard that the order directed him to file the accounting two weeks prior to today's hearing date and the importance of complying with Court orders. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
